title: Gibson plan registry
description: Canonical definition of every Gibson plan. Consumed by the tenant-operator (Go) and the dashboard prebuild script (TS). Schema simplified by spec plans-and-quotas-simplification.

version.description: Registry schema version (informational; bump on breaking changes).

stripeProductId.description: Stripe product ID for self-serve plans; null for contact-only plans.

pricing.description: Display-side pricing metadata. At least one of monthlyUSD/annualUSD/contactSales=true must be present.

concurrent_missions.description: Max missions in non-terminal execution state at any moment; 0 = unlimited.

concurrent_agents.description: Max agents bound to in-flight mission tasks at any moment; 0 = unlimited. Idle-but-connected agents do NOT count.
